base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_overworld_dungeon_header — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Top HUD — 'INVENTORY' / Counter strip / B/A button indicator / 'LIFE' hearts readout. Always visible at top of screen during gameplay. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Top HUD — 'INVENTORY' / Counter strip / B/A button indicator / 'LIFE' hearts readout. Always visible at top of screen during gameplay
